definition:
1. to go slowly, to walk , Lat. ambulare, (Homeric Hymns): to go, march , of horsemen, (Xenophon Historicus): to go by land , (Demosthenes Orator):—;with accusative cognate, βάδον, ὁδὸν β. (Aristophanes Comicus) 
2. generally, ἐπ᾽ οἰκίας βαδ. to enter  houses, (Demosthenes Orator): to proceed  (in argument), (Demosthenes Orator):—;of things, αἱ τιμαὶ ἐπ᾽ ἔλαττον ἐβάδιζον prices were getting  lower, (Demosthenes Orator) (ML)
